x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Eligibility Evaluation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The process that determines whether a customer, partner, or account qualifies for an incentive based on predefined criteria.

Comment:
Examples:
Minimum transaction amount
Account balance threshold
Product ownership
Transaction volume

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The function that determines the value of the incentive based on the defined calculation method.

Comment:
Example:
€200 purchase × 5% cashback = €10 reward.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The process of accumulating earned incentives over time before they are paid or redeemed.

Comment:
Example
Loyalty points accumulate monthly based on spending.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Payout
x-enumeration-literals.description: The operational process of delivering the incentive benefit to the customer or beneficiary.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Tracking and Monitoring
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The function that records and monitors incentive activities, ensuring transparency and compliance.

Includes
incentive transactions
reward balances
redemption history
audit logs

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Notification
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The service that informs customers or partners about incentive eligibility, rewards earned, or payouts.

Channels
Mobile banking alerts
Email notifications
SMS alerts
Online banking dashboard

Comment:
Example:
Congratulations! You earned €15 cashback this month.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Redemption Management
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The function that allows customers to redeem accumulated rewards or incentives.

Comment:
Examples
Redeem loyalty points for gifts
Convert reward points to cashback
Use points for travel bookings

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Reporting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The process of generating reports related to incentive programs for management, accounting, and regulatory purposes.

Comment:
Typical reports
Incentive cost reports
Program performance reports
Customer reward summaries

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Behavioral Triggers
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rewards are linked to specific actions, such as transactions, deposits, referrals, or product enrollment.
